assertions.assertion: Output identifies that SaveTokens = true is missing on the OIDC handler and explains it's required for user token management
Output identifies that offline_access scope is missing so no refresh tokens will be issued
Output identifies the manual _cachedToken field as incorrect double-caching that won't stay in sync with the library's cache
Output identifies that .GetToken() is called without first checking .Succeeded, which will throw InvalidOperationException on failure
Output identifies that AddClientCredentialsTokenHandler is used without AddDefaultAccessTokenResiliency(), meaning 401 responses won't be retried
